section_name: I. Compliance with duties of information
content_to_be_reported:
I. Compliance with duties of information
II. Summary 
Part A – Information about the issuer of the asset-referenced token
Part AA - information on other persons offering to the public or seeking admission to trading of asset-referenced tokens other than the issuer and on other persons drawing up the crypto-asset white paper in accordance with Article 19(1), second subparagraph, of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114
Part B - Information about the asset-referenced token 
Part C - Information about the offer to the public of the asset-referenced token or its admission to trading 
Part D - Information on the rights and obligations attached to the asset-referenced token 
Part E - Information on the underlying technology 
Part F - Information on the risks 
Part G - Information on the reserve of assets 
Part H – Information on the sustainability indicators in relation to adverse impact on the climate and other environment-related adverse impacts

section_name: I. Compliance with duties of information
content_to_be_reported: dateOfNotification

field: Statement in accordance with Article 19(4), points (a) to (e), of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114
section_name: I. Compliance with duties of information
content_to_be_reported:
The asset-referenced token referred to in this crypto-asset white paper may lose its value in part or in full, may not always be transferable and may not be liquid.
The asset-referenced token referred to in this crypto-asset white paper is not covered by the investor compensation schemes under Directive 97/9/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council or the deposit guarantee schemes under Directive 2014/49/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council.

field: Compliance statement in accordance with Article 19(5) of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114
section_name: I. Compliance with duties of information
content_to_be_reported: This crypto-asset white paper complies with Title III of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 of the European Parliament and of the Council and to the best of the knowledge of the management body, the information presented in this crypto-asset white paper is fair, clear and not misleading and the crypto-asset white paper makes no omission likely to affect its import.

field: Warning in accordance with Article 19(6), second subparagraph, of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114
section_name: II. Summary
content_to_be_reported:
Warning
This summary should be read as an introduction to the crypto-asset white paper.
The prospective holder should base any decision to purchase this asset-referenced token on the content of the crypto-asset white paper as a whole and not on the summary alone.
The offer to the public of this crypto-asset does not constitute an offer or solicitation to purchase financial instruments and any such offer or solicitation can be made only by means of a prospectus or other offer documents pursuant to the applicable national law.
This crypto-asset white paper does not constitute a prospectus as referred to in Regulation (EU) 2017/1129 of the European Parliament and of the Council or any other offer document pursuant to Union or national law.

section_name: II. Summary
content_to_be_reported: A brief, clear and non-technical description of the characteristics of the asset-referenced token concerned in order to help prospective holders of that asset-referenced token make an informed decision

section_name: II. Summary
content_to_be_reported:
The holders of asset-referenced tokens have a right of redemption at any time
Description of the conditions for such redemption
form_and_standards:
Predefined alphanumerical text
Free alphanumerical text

field: Financial condition for the past three years
section_name:
Part A: Information about the issuer of the asset-referenced 
token
content_to_be_reported:
If A.13 is True, write N/A, otherwise: Financial condition of the issuer over the past three years.
This shall be assessed based on a fair review of the development and performance of the business of the issuer and of its position for each year and interim period for which historical financial information is required, including the causes of material changes.
The review shall be a balanced and comprehensive analysis of the development and performance of the business of the issuer and of its position, consistent with the size and complexity of the business.

section_name:
Part A: Information about the issuer of the asset-referenced 
token
content_to_be_reported:
If A.13 is False, write N/A, otherwise: Where the issuer has not been established for the past three years, its financial condition since the date of its registration.
This shall be assessed based on a fair review of the development and performance of the business of the issuer and of its position for each year and interim period for which historical financial information is required, including the causes of material changes.
The review shall be a balanced and comprehensive analysis of the development and performance of the business of the issuer and of its position, consistent with the size and complexity of the business.

section_name:
Part A: Information about the issuer of the asset-referenced 
token
content_to_be_reported: A detailed description of the issuer’s governance arrangements

section_name:
Part A: Information about the issuer of the asset-referenced 
token
content_to_be_reported: Indication of whether the issuer of asset-referenced tokens is exempted from authorisation  If the market value of the token (including other versions of the same token issued by “linked issuers”) averaged below 5 million EUR over the past 12 months, then write “EX16” If the ART can only be held by qualified investors, and the offer is exclusively addressed to them, then write “EX16”  If the issuer is a credit institution, then write “EX17”  If both exceptions apply, then write “EX16, EX17”  If none of the above apply, then write “NOEX”
form_and_standards:
‘NOEX’ – No exemption
‘EX17’ – Exemption in accordance with Article 17
‘EX16’ – Exemption in accordance with Article 16

the asset-referenced token

section_name:
Part D: Information on the rights and obligations attached to 
the asset-referenced token

Free alphanumerical text presented in a tabular format
{ISIN} where applicable

the asset-referenced token

the asset-referenced token

Part D: Information on the rights and obligations attached to 
the asset-referenced token

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported:
Fill in the field only if a DTI is not provided in field B.15
Information on the distributed ledger technology

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: Information on the protocols and technical standards used, allowing for the holding, storing and transfer of the asset-referenced token

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: Other information on the technology used allowing for the holding, storing and transfer of asset-referenced tokens, if relevant

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: The consensus mechanism, where applicable

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: Incentive mechanisms to secure transactions and any fees applicable

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: Indication as to whether the asset-referenced tokens are issued, transferred and stored using distributed ledger technology that is operated by the issuer or a third-party acting on the issuer’s behalf
form_and_standards:
‘true’ – Yes, DLT operated by the issuer or a third-party acting on the issuer’s behalf
‘false’ – No, DLT not operated by the issuer or a third-party acting on the issuer’s behalf

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: If the DLT is operated by the issuer or a third party acting on the issuer’s behalf, a detailed description of the functioning of such distributed ledger technology

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: Indication as to whether an audit of the technology used was conducted

section_name: Part E: Information on the underlying technology
content_to_be_reported: If an audit was conducted, information on the outcome of the audit of the technology used

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: The risks related to the reserve of assets, when the issuer is not able to fulfil its obligations

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: A description of the risks associated with the issuer of the asset-referenced token

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: A description of the risks associated with the offer to the public of the asset-referenced token or its admission to trading

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: Description of the risks associated with the asset-referenced token, in particular with regard to the asset referenced

field: Risks related to operationalisation of the asset-referenced Token project
section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: A description of the risks associated with the operationalisation of the asset-referenced token project

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: Description of the risks associated with the technology used

section_name: Part F: Information on the risks
content_to_be_reported: Mitigation measures of the risks associated with the technology used, if any

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: Detailed description of the mechanism aimed at aligning the value of the reserve of assets with the claim associated with the asset-referenced token, including legal and technical aspects

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: Detailed description of the reserve of assets and their composition

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: A description of the mechanisms through which asset-referenced tokens are issued and redeemed

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: Information on whether a part of the reserve assets are invested

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: If a part of the reserve assets are invested, a description of the investment policy for the reserve assets

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: Description of the custody arrangements for the reserve assets, including their segregation

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: Name of crypto-asset service providers providing custody and administration of crypto-assets on behalf of clients, credit institutions, or investment firms appointed as custodians of the reserve assets

section_name: Part G: Information on the reserve of assets
content_to_be_reported: LEI of the CASP providing custody and administration of crypto-assets on behalf of clients, credit institutions, or investment firms appointed as custodians of the reserve assets

content_to_be_reported: Energy consumption sources and methodologies

content_to_be_reported: Average amount of energy used per validated transaction

form_and_standards: Amount in tonnes (t) carbon dioxide equivalent (CO2e) {DECIMAL-18/5}

content_to_be_reported: Average GHG emissions (scope 1 and scope 2) per validated transaction
